clues.content: 把一张蘑菇图. 片标注为“瓶盖”。错误。把一张拖车图片标注为“电吉他”。错误。把一. 张棱皮龟图片标注为“浴巾”。错误。 但失败并非无用功。错误会触发纠正信号，在网络的

clues.title: AI潮流- 第2 页- 立委NLP频道
clues.content: In 2025, multimodal models and agents pushed AI from “answering questions” to “getting things done.” Suno v5 made it possible for ordinary people to reliably produce loop-worthy music; Sora 2 moved video generation from isolated clips toward storyboarded narratives with consistency; and widespread day-to-day use of FSD makes the safety conversation feel closer to apples-to-apples. Every few tens of milliseconds, the quantizer picks a set of indices from the layered codebooks to describe that sli
